source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 8: Sanity, treatment and recovery (p.164). Indefinite insanity requires treatment to recover; three treatment paths are modeled here. These mirror the PsychotherapySession implementation in coc_healing.py.

psychoanalysis.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164: weekly Psychoanalysis skill roll offers a SAN recovery chance scaled by success level.

asylum_confinement.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164: an indefinitely insane investigator may be confined to an asylum; recovery is resolved at the end of the confinement period.

asylum_release.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164: at the end of asylum confinement, a Psychoanalysis roll determines whether treatment succeeded.

self_help.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164: a self-help recovery attempt resolved by a SAN roll.
